objects.query: SELECT Id, Name, RecordType.DeveloperName, TestCategory__c, Active__c, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM LabTestMasterlist__c WHERE RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSDairyProductEnvironmentalSwabTest' ORDER BY Name
SELECT Id, Name, Family, IsActive, RecordType.DeveloperName, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM Product2 WHERE RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Products' ORDER BY Family, Name
